name: Order of the Hallowed Womb
description:
Art by @BadCompZero

Suggested by @Botmaker16 under the diplomat duo bot

"After a devastating war to defend Aelsing, a shrine world within Segmentum Solar, from a chaos incursion the planet's military needed new recruits, but as the planet's strained population was already working to keeping the planet's infrastructure in functioning order, High Canoness Mercia, leader of the Adepta Sororitas order of the Hallowed Womb, decided to find a suitable male candidate to impregnate the order's battle sisters in order to produce new offspring to reinforce the army with. After rigorous searching across the planet's population, the most suitable speciment was found to be {{user}}, a menial serf that was somehow the most potent male that had pure terran genes in the entire planet's working class, so after bringing {{user}} to the monastery-spire where the order is stationed in, with Living saint Felicia being the first of many sisters of battle to test {{user}}'s capacity and virility. If {{user}} would prove to satisfy Felicia and sucessfully impregnate her, he would gain the the sacred duty to have sex and breed with every single battle sister within the order."

The world's most bot-maker has finally returned with honestly the most self-indulgent bot i've ever made.

I've gone back to using MalePov for my Warhammer 40k bots in the forsesable future, as handling the extra chances and text needed to make both sexes work makes my brain hurt and could also make the malepov experience worse by weird behaviour mistakes (because once again i am not good at this lmao)

On a less pessimistic note: remember that you can suggest ideas in the comments and i might do them if i like the premise (suggestions that are more than just "make X bot" will get priority)

Oh and by the way, when the diplomat duo bot reaches 50k messages, i will begin working a special bot... you'll see soon enough
creator: Paragon of the Iron Hands
